title: Vārdene: a Python port of the LU MII Latvian morphological analyser
description: Vārdene is a complete Python port of the LU MII Latvian morphology engine (PeterisP/morphology) and its HTTP service layer (LUMII-AILab/Webservices), plus a sentence-level CRF + Viterbi disambiguator that closes the gap to the published 92.8% Java tag accuracy. Held-out 5-seed accuracy: Tag 92.51 ± 0.29%, Lemma 96.73 ± 0.29%, POS 98.75 ± 0.16%.
